title.en: The ImageNet Era: AlexNet and the Deep Learning Breakthrough

name.zh: 亚历克斯·克里热夫斯基

quoteText.en: We trained a large, deep convolutional neural network to classify the 1.2 million high-resolution images in the ImageNet LSVRC-2010 contest into the 1000 different classes.
quoteText.zh: 我们训练了一个大型深度卷积神经网络，将 ImageNet 分类错误率大幅降低。
